title: Cloud Service Models and Deployment Types
description: A flowchart illustrating the relationship between core cloud service models (IaaS, PaaS, SaaS) and common deployment types (Public, Private, Hybrid, Community Cloud)
relationships: IaaS, PaaS, and SaaS are service models that can be deployed on Public, Private, Hybrid, or Community cloud infrastructures, showing the separation between what cloud provides (service models) and how it is deployed (deployment types)
